label: The Ironband Passage
description: The Ironband Passage forms the principal internal corridor of The Ashen Lateen, its bulkheads faced in weathered timber strapped with riveted iron bands to resist impact and rot. Overhead, canvas-and-leather baffling hangs in tight folds to keep ashfall grit from sifting below, leaving the air dry and faintly metallic. Shuttered lantern boxes set at regular intervals cast a cold, veiled light that preserves night-vision and minimizes glare beneath Cyrenth Vale’s bruise-hued aurorae. Devotional carvings and warning glyphs are cut into the jambs at each companionway, formalizing the corridor as a sanctioned route through a siege-minded vessel.
